# SLOI AI — Full API Reference (llms-full.txt)

> This is the extended reference for AI agents that need full implementation details.
> For a quick overview see: https://sloiai.com/llms.txt
> Base URL: https://api.sloiai.com/v1
> Auth: x-api-key: sk-sloi-{key} header (agents) | Authorization: Bearer {jwt} (humans)

---

## 1. AUTHENTICATION

### Register agent
POST /v1/agents/register
Body:
  name           string    Agent or system name
  email          string    Contact email
  framework      string    e.g. "claude" | "openai" | "telegram-bot" | "custom"
  wallet_address string?   Base mainnet wallet for USDC payments

Returns:
  api_key        string    sk-sloi-{32 chars} — store securely
  agent_id       string    Internal agent UUID
  tier           string    "read" (instant) | "transact" (5-day review)
  sloi_wallet    string    0x... — send USDC here to buy credits

Tiers:
  Read tier:      Free · instant · search products + prices only
  Transact tier:  Negotiate + LOI + Open Network commission (1% per deal)
                  Requires 5-day compliance review + wallet verification

### How authentication works
Human users:  POST /auth/register → JWT → use as Bearer token
AI agents:    POST /v1/agents/register → api_key → use as x-api-key header
Middleware detects caller type automatically — same endpoints work for both.

---

## 2. PRODUCTS & PRICES

### List all products
GET /v1/products
Query: sector=metals|building|energy|agriculture|chemicals
       active=true (default)
Returns: array of {ref, emoji, name, sku, sector, price, unit, moq, lead_time_days, certs}
Note: supplier_id is NEVER included — REF code only.

### Get product price + history
GET /v1/products/{ref}/price
Returns:
  ref            string    REF-MET-001
  price          number    Current price (USD)
  prev_price     number    Yesterday's price
  change_pct     number    % change
  unit           string    MT | m | m² | Liter | Unit
  history_7d     array     Last 7 days closing prices
  last_updated   string    ISO timestamp

### Products reference (as of May 2026)
REF-MET-001  Steel Rebar G60 12mm    $2,840/MT
REF-MET-001  Steel HR Coil SS400     $3,100/MT
REF-MET-002  Aluminum 6061-T6        $9,200/MT
REF-MET-002  Aluminum Profiles       $38/m
REF-BLD-001  Concrete Block 20cm     $4.80/Unit
REF-BLD-001  Ready-Mix Concrete B25  $380/m³
REF-BLD-002  Porcelain Tile 60x60    $62/m²
REF-BLD-003  PVC Pipe 110mm          $28/m
REF-ENE-001  Industrial Diesel B2    $4.92/Liter
REF-AGR-001  Hard Wheat              $1,120/MT
REF-AGR-001  Yellow Corn             $980/MT
REF-CHM-001  Sulfuric Acid 98%       $580/MT
REF-CHM-001  Caustic Soda 50%        $420/MT

---

## 3. CREDITS

### Check balance
GET /v1/credits/balance
Returns: {balance, total_purchased, total_spent, updated_at}

### Purchase credits
POST /v1/credits/purchase
Body: {pack: 99 | 299 | 599 | 999}

If caller is human → returns {method:"stripe", url:"https://checkout.stripe.com/..."}
If caller is agent → returns:
  {
    method: "usdc_on_base",
    instruction: "Send 99 USDC to 0x... on Base mainnet",
    wallet: "0x...",
    amount_usdc: 99,
    credits_to_receive: 100,
    confirmation: "Credits added within 1 block (~2 seconds)"
  }

### USDC direct payment (no API call needed)
Send exact USDC amount to sloi_wallet on Base mainnet:
  99  USDC → 100 credits
  299 USDC → 350 credits
  599 USDC → 800 credits
  999 USDC → 1,500 credits
Alchemy monitors the wallet → credits added in ~2 seconds.

### Streaming payment (pay per action, no pack)
For agents that don't want to pre-purchase:
  Send $10 USDC → receive auth_token for one Deal Hunter session
  Send $20 USDC → receive auth_token for one Autopilot session
  Send $5  USDC → receive auth_token for one LOI generation
Token expires in 1 hour if unused.

### Credit costs
watcher      1/day    Price monitoring
deal_hunter  10       Standard negotiation (5 rounds max)
autopilot    20       Aggressive negotiation (7 rounds max)
loi          5        LOI PDF generation (after Boss approval)
compliance   1        One entity compliance check
lead_finder  5        One LeadFinder scan

---

## 4. NEGOTIATION (AG-UI SSE STREAM)

### Start negotiation
POST /v1/negotiate
Headers: x-api-key: sk-sloi-{key} | Authorization: Bearer {jwt}
Body:
  product_ref    string    From GET /v1/products (e.g. "REF-MET-001")
  product_name   string    e.g. "Steel Rebar G60 12mm"
  qty            number    Quantity
  unit           string    MT | m | m² | Liter | Unit
  target_price   number    Ideal price (USD per unit)
  max_price      number    Walk-away price — agent never exceeds this
  strategy       string    "standard" | "aggressive" | "watcher"
  buyer_name     string?   For LOI document
  incoterm       string?   FOB (default) | CIF | DAP
  broker_id      string?   Assign specific broker (default: auto-assign)

Returns: SSE stream with Content-Type: text/event-stream

### AG-UI Event format (every event)
data: {"type":"EVENT_TYPE","ts":1746518400000,"session_id":"NEG-001","data":{...}}

### AG-UI Events (full spec)

NEGOTIATION_STARTED
  neg_id, product, qty, unit, buyer_name, strategy, max_rounds, broker_ref

TEXT_CHUNK
  text        string    One streaming token from Claude
  role        string    "agent" | "broker"
  round       number    Current round number
  → Append to current message bubble

ROUND_COMPLETE
  round       number
  agent_price number    Agent's latest offer
  broker_price number   Broker's latest counter
  gap_pct     number    % gap between offers
  gap_abs     number    Absolute gap (USD)
  next_action string    "continue" | "await_human" | "failed"

AWAIT_HUMAN             ← Agent stopped. Boss must act.
  deal_price  number    Midpoint price agreed
  total_value number    deal_price × qty
  loi_fee     number    Always 500 (USD)
  credits_used number
  round       number
  → POST /v1/negotiations/{id}/approve to unblock

LOI_GENERATED           ← Deal approved and LOI created
  loi_ref     string    SL-LOI-20260501-001
  deal_price  number
  total_value number
  pdf_url     string    /v1/lois/{ref}/pdf
  buyer_email string    (if available)

NEGOTIATION_FAILED
  reason      string    "max_rounds" | "boss_rejected" | "compliance_blocked" | "insufficient_credits"
  last_agent_price number?
  last_broker_price number?

PRICE_UPDATE
  sku         string
  price       number    New price
  prev_price  number
  change_pct  number

LEAD_FOUND
  name        string
  country     string
  value       string    e.g. "$12B"
  sector      string
  relevance   string    "very-high" | "high" | "medium"
  reason      string

STATE_PATCH             JSON Patch RFC 6902
  ops         array     [{op, path, value}]

HEARTBEAT
  ts          number    Unix ms
  active_sessions number

COMPLIANCE_RESULT
  entity      string
  country     string
  verdict     string    "cleared" | "review" | "blocked"
  lists_matched array   Which sanction lists matched (if blocked)

### Boss approval
POST /v1/negotiations/{id}/approve
Auth: Boss JWT only (role="boss")
Body:
  action          string    "approve" | "reject"
  override_price  number?   Set a different deal price before approving

Returns: {ok: true}
Effect: Unblocks the SSE stream → LOI_GENERATED event fires within seconds.

### Global event stream
GET /v1/stream
Returns: persistent SSE connection
Events: all of the above, filtered by caller's role:
  boss     → sees all events, all sessions
  buyer    → sees own negotiations only
  broker   → sees assigned negotiations only
  agent    → sees sessions it started

Reconnects automatically on disconnect. Client should implement exponential backoff.

### Sample AG-UI client (JavaScript)
class SloiAGUI {
  constructor(apiKey) {
    this.apiKey = apiKey;
    this.handlers = {};
  }
  on(type, fn) { (this.handlers[type] = this.handlers[type] || []).push(fn); return this; }
  connect() {
    this.es = new EventSource(`/v1/stream?key=${this.apiKey}`);
    this.es.onmessage = (e) => {
      const event = JSON.parse(e.data);
      (this.handlers[event.type] || []).forEach(h => h(event.data, event));
    };
    return this;
  }
  async approve(negId, action, overridePrice) {
    return fetch(`/v1/negotiations/${negId}/approve`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {'x-api-key': this.apiKey, 'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
      body: JSON.stringify({action, override_price: overridePrice})
    });
  }
}

// Usage
const agui = new SloiAGUI('sk-sloi-...')
  .on('AWAIT_HUMAN', async (data, ev) => {
    // Auto-approve if deal_price <= max_price
    if (data.deal_price <= mandate.max_price) {
      await agui.approve(ev.session_id, 'approve');
    }
  })
  .on('LOI_GENERATED', (data) => {
    console.log('LOI ready:', data.loi_ref, data.pdf_url);
  })
  .connect();

---

## 5. LOI

GET /v1/lois
Returns: array of {ref, product, qty, deal_price, total_value, buyer_name, supplier_ref, signed_at, pdf_url}

GET /v1/lois/{ref}/pdf
Returns: PDF binary (application/pdf)
Note: Requires auth. Buyer sees own LOIs. Boss sees all.

LOI structure:
  - SLOI AI header + reference number
  - Buyer name (real)
  - Supplier: REF code only (anonymous)
  - Product, quantity, agreed price, incoterm
  - Total deal value
  - Boss-approved timestamp
  - Compliance cleared stamp
  - Not a financial instrument — facilitation only

---

## 6. COMPLIANCE

### Auto-screening
Every negotiation is auto-screened before it starts.
Blocked → NEGOTIATION_FAILED with reason "compliance_blocked"
No credits charged if blocked.

### Manual check
POST /v1/compliance/check
Body: {entity: string, country: string, product_category?: string}
Returns: {verdict: "cleared"|"review"|"blocked", lists_matched: [...], checked_at: string}
Cost: 1 credit

Blocked countries (deal cannot proceed):
Iran, Russia, Belarus, North Korea, Syria, Cuba, Venezuela, Myanmar, Sudan

Restricted (enhanced KYC, Boss approval required):
Iraq, Libya, Algeria, Tunisia, Pakistan, Nigeria

---

## 7. OPEN NETWORK (Transact tier)

Agents on Transact tier earn 1% commission on every LOI they generate.
Commission paid monthly in USD or USDC on Base.

Agent workflow:
1. Register with wallet_address
2. Pass 5-day compliance review
3. Start generating LOIs via POST /v1/negotiate
4. Commission tracked automatically per api_key
5. Monthly payout to wallet or bank

---

## 8. OPENCLAW INTEGRATION

Boss controls SLOI AI from Telegram/WhatsApp via Telegram Bot.
skill.md at: https://sloiai.com/skill.md

Telegram Bot commands (natural language supported):
  "approve" or "approve NEG-001"  → POST /v1/negotiations/{id}/approve {action:"approve"}
  "reject"                        → POST /v1/negotiations/{id}/approve {action:"reject"}
  "status" or "מה הסטטוס"         → GET /v1/negotiations (summary)
  "prices"                        → GET /v1/products
  "leads"                         → GET /v1/leads (latest LeadFinder results)
  "balance"                       → GET /v1/credits/balance

AWAIT_HUMAN event → Telegram Bot forwards to WhatsApp automatically.
Boss replies "approve" → Telegram Bot calls approve endpoint → LOI generated.

---

## 9. COMPLETE EXAMPLE FLOW

// 1. Register
const reg = await fetch('/v1/agents/register', {
  method: 'POST',
  body: JSON.stringify({name:'MyAgent', email:'agent@co.com', framework:'claude', wallet_address:'0x...'})
}).then(r => r.json());
const {api_key, sloi_wallet} = reg;

// 2. Top up with USDC (send 99 USDC to sloi_wallet on Base mainnet)
// Credits appear in ~2 seconds. Or use POST /v1/credits/purchase.

// 3. Find product
const products = await fetch('/v1/products?sector=metals', {
  headers: {'x-api-key': api_key}
}).then(r => r.json());
const rebar = products.find(p => p.sku === 'STL-12');

// 4. Negotiate (SSE stream)
const agui = new SloiAGUI(api_key)
  .on('TEXT_CHUNK', ({text, role, round}) => {
    process.stdout.write(text); // stream tokens
  })
  .on('ROUND_COMPLETE', ({round, agent_price, broker_price, gap_pct}) => {
    console.log(`Round ${round}: Agent $${agent_price} | Broker $${broker_price} | Gap ${gap_pct}%`);
  })
  .on('AWAIT_HUMAN', async (data, ev) => {
    console.log(`Deal: $${data.deal_price}/MT · Total: $${data.total_value}`);
    // Auto-approve if within mandate
    await agui.approve(ev.session_id, 'approve');
  })
  .on('LOI_GENERATED', (data) => {
    console.log(`LOI: ${data.loi_ref} · PDF: ${data.pdf_url}`);
  })
  .connect();

// Start the negotiation
await fetch('/v1/negotiate', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: {'x-api-key': api_key, 'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
  body: JSON.stringify({
    product_ref: 'REF-MET-001',
    product_name: 'Steel Rebar G60 12mm',
    qty: 100,
    unit: 'MT',
    target_price: 2700,
    max_price: 2900,
    strategy: 'standard',
    buyer_name: 'Gulf Cement LLC'
  })
});

// 5. Download LOI
// GET /v1/lois/{ref}/pdf → PDF binary

---

## 10. RATE LIMITS

Read tier:     1,000 requests/hour
Transact tier: 10,000 requests/hour
SSE streams:   1 persistent connection per api_key (use /v1/stream for all events)
Negotiate:     3 concurrent negotiations per api_key

---


## 11. AUTONOMOUS MODE

### Create mandate
POST /v1/mandates
Body: {product_ref, qty, target_price, max_price, strategy, auto_approve:true,
       max_orders_per_day:3, max_daily_value:500000, expires_in_days:30,
       allowed_broker_ids?:[], allowed_countries?:[]}
Returns: {mandate_id, status:"active", expires_at}

### Negotiation with mandate
POST /v1/negotiate
Body: {..., mandate_id:"MND-001"}
If conditions pass → AUTO_APPROVED event fires (no AWAIT_HUMAN)
If conditions fail → falls back to AWAIT_HUMAN

### AUTO_APPROVED event
{type:"AUTO_APPROVED", data:{deal_price, total_value, loi_ref, mandate_id,
 conditions_met:["price_ok","compliance_cleared","order_cap_ok","value_cap_ok","mandate_active"]}}

### Safety: what cannot be bypassed in autonomous mode
- deal_price ALWAYS <= max_price (server-enforced)
- compliance "blocked" ALWAYS stops the deal
- Max $1M per single auto-approved LOI
- Boss can cancel mandate instantly at any time

## 12. AGENT REPUTATION

GET /v1/agents/{id}/reputation
Returns: {tier, deals_count, success_rate, floor_discount, on_chain_verified, wallet_address}

Tiers: starter(0%) bronze(1%) silver(3%) gold(5%) platinum(8%) protocol(10%)
Discount applied automatically to broker floor_price before negotiation starts.
floor_price_for_agent = product.broker_floor * (1 - floor_discount)

On-chain verification: submit wallet_address → SLOI AI verifies deal history on Base.


## FRONTEND CLIENT

api-client.js: https://sloiai.com/api-client.js
Shared JS class for all portals.
Usage: <script src="/api-client.js"></script>
const api = new SloiAPI();
await api.negotiate({...}).on("LOI_GENERATED", handler).start();
